chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D-2224 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 02.12.2019. Petitioner in person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl:A.G = The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has mainly sought for cancellation of the mutation entries with direction to Revenue official to maintain the same afresh by including all the legal heirs of the deceased Khatedars. Such controversy, being factual in its nature could not be resolved by this Court by way of instant constitutional petition in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. It is dismissed accordingly with advise to petitioner to have a recourse of law before Civil Court having jurisdiction. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
